productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Black Shoes
description: Formal dressing only gets better with these slip-on black patent leather loafers from red tape. The tapered toe box and stylish tassel complement all semi-formal and formal wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Patent leather upper with a smooth finish for maximum durability, comfort and style Tapered toe with stitching around forefoot and tasselled strap across midfoot Leather heel cup stitched to the backfoot for enhanced protection Slip-on style for easy use Leather collar for in-step comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining and padded footbed for breathability and all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a wooden finish on the forefoot and heel for grip on smooth surfaces Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
